evaluations.message: Heartbleed (CVE-2014-0160) — vulnerable, info leak. CC6.6 vulnerability management requires identification and remediation of known vulnerabilities.
Heartbleed (CVE-2014-0160) — vulnerable, info leak. RA-5 requires regular vulnerability scanning and remediation.
Heartbleed (CVE-2014-0160) — vulnerable, info leak. SI-2 requires timely flaw remediation; this CVE has had a patched OpenSSL release since 2014.
Heartbleed (CVE-2014-0160) — vulnerable, info leak. PCI 6.3.3 requires high-risk vulnerabilities be addressed within 1 month.
Heartbleed (CVE-2014-0160) — vulnerable, info leak. A.8.8 requires management of technical vulnerabilities.
Heartbleed (CVE-2014-0160) — vulnerable, info leak. VPM-03 requires remediation of identified vulnerabilities within risk-based timeframes.
